emails.subject: Online Trading Status Meeting
emails.body: Are you available to speak for about 15-20 minutes at the start of our meeting next Tuesday to discuss "the Legal approval process for online trading"? Forwarded by Karen Lambert/HOU/ECT on 10/16/2000 03:51 PM From: Karen Lambert on 10/16/2000 11:19 AM
